Name: Swarmed
Description: Monster mod: optional CreatureEx champion variants (factory roll, FakeInt 10029, /cex) plus call-for-help reinforcements on kill. Reinforcements are separate for landscape vs dungeon; CreatureEx deaths never call for help. Optional scaling of CreatureEx and reinforcement roll chances by shard online player count (Settings). Admins: /swarmed debug. Defaults: dungeon reinforcements on at 5% chance.
